conservative.name: Jeer 'N' Jab
conservative.requirements:
Used By: Sikboyz Goblins, Gobspite;
Engaged with target

success.description: The goblin attacks simultaneously with his weapon and cruel laughter and mocking words (thoroughly corrupted by the strange goblin dialect). The target is struck for normal damage, and suffers 1 stress
The attack inflicts normal damage, and the target suffers fatigue and stress equal to the number of critical wounds he is currently suffering

bane.description: The target may immediately perform a manoeuvre after the attacker completes this action

chaosStar.description: All greenskins in the engagement suffer 1 wound

success.description: Yer target iz bof stoopid an' ugly, so tell 'im! Also, poke him wif sticks an' sharp fings. The target is struck for normal damage, and suffers 1 stress
Jus' like before, only better, wif +2 damage an' +1 critical!

boon.description: Aw, ya made th' ugly git cry! Ya jab 'im for extra damage equal to the amount of stress he currently suffers from

bane.description: The target may immediately perform a manoeuvre after you complete this action, pro'lly ta run home ta cry

chaosStar.description: Uh oh, now 'e's angry! Th' target gets +2 damage on his next attack against you
